name: kitabu
description: Kitabu is a beautiful, responsive notes taking app with local-first storage.

scripts.build:web: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html styles.css app.js dist/
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:web && npm exec cap sync android
scripts.apk:debug: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.apk:release: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
